name: iRidge, Inc.
summary: iRidge, Inc. engages in the planning, development, and operation of Internet services in Japan. It develops O2O applications; offers promotion planning, communication design, and business development services; financial technology solutions, including MoneyEasy and BUS PAY; real estate technology/voice user interface solutions, such as digital signage for condominiums, offices, and commercial facilities, as well as NOID, a voice AI assistants solution. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
